variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16030 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16030 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16030 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 234.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 133.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 324.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 313.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P527484 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16030
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P527484 Air Filter, Primary Radialseal | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16030
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson RadialSeal™ Filters? Reliable, leak- resistant Radial Seal™ keeps filters in place – even under heavy vibration. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4878 Air Filter, Primary Magnum Rs | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16030
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4878 Air Filter, Primary Magnum Rs | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16030
variants.description: Fleetguard® AF4878 Magnum RS™ radial seal primary air element is designed to meet the rugged demands of equipment operating in the harshest environments.  The Magnum RS offers unique features that provide significant benefits for longer service life and optimum performance when the job demands it.
